title: persona-judge config
description: Locked-range threshold overrides for persona-judge. v0.4.0 closes integration.md §6.2 S5 by rejecting config values outside sane ranges at load time.

pass_threshold_raw.description: Raw score (/110) at which verdict transitions from CONDITIONAL_PASS to PASS.

density_floor.description: Density score below which verdict is forced to FAIL regardless of total.

required_tensions.description: Number of preserved tensions needed to score max on Internal Tensions dimension.

required_boundaries.description: Number of explicit limits needed to score max on Honest Boundaries dimension.

primary_source_min.description: Minimum ratio of primary-source corpus for max Primary-Source dimension score.

critical_failure_count.description: Number of 0-scoring dimensions that triggers a forced FAIL.
